name: Snowline Gold Corp.
summary: Snowline Gold Corp. engages in the exploration of gold properties in Canada. Its flagship project is the Einarson property that consists of two main claim blocks and various outlying claims covering an area of approximately 61,690 hectares in the Selwyn Basin; and interest in the Rogue property that comprises 105 mineral claims covering an area of 2,439 hectares in the Selwyn Basin, Canada. The company was formerly known as Skyledger Tech Corp. and changed its name to Snowline Gold Corp. in February 2021. Snowline Gold Corp. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
